problem_and_motivation.summary: Paper waivers cause slow check-in and unreliable record-keeping. Launch blocker.

stakeholders_and_impact.summary: All customers, front-desk staff, managers. Table stakes for sales.

feasibility.summary: Fully feasible. Permissions pre-stubbed. Native e-sign. First public page is new ground.

high_level_scope.summary: Templates + signing + status check + expiration + minor/guardian. Phone-first. Kiosk/reminders/analytics out.

key_risks_and_assumptions.summary: Legal sufficiency of native e-sign (low). First public page pattern. Data retention needs investigation.

requirements_level_notes: No requirements-level questions were asked. The interview stayed at the capability/scope level throughout. Questions about how customers sign, what's in/out, and minor signing were all framed as capability decisions, not behavioral rules or field-level details. Data retention policy was explicitly deferred to /define. No questions about approval flows, specific field requirements, template structure, or permissions logic were raised.
define_suggestion_location: Final assistant message: 'Review this and tell me what to change. When satisfied, run /define.'
